name: toodledo-pp-mcp
description: Every Toodledo feature from the terminal, plus an offline SQLite mirror, GTD reviews, and rate-budget-aware sync that no other Toodledo tool has.

toodledo_client_id.title: TOODLEDO_CLIENT_ID
toodledo_client_id.description: Sets TOODLEDO_CLIENT_ID for the Toodledo MCP server.

toodledo_client_secret.title: TOODLEDO_CLIENT_SECRET
toodledo_client_secret.description: Sets TOODLEDO_CLIENT_SECRET for the Toodledo MCP server.
